Providing future residents with housing choices is good planning   When it comes to accommodating projected growth in the GTA, the approach chosen by a region or municipality matters. Different approaches result in very different outcomes for future residents in terms of housing choice, mix, supply and ultimately housing affordability.   Recent decisions by two regions in the GTA illustrate this point. Durham has taken a pragmatic approach that will likely lead to a mix of housing choices for future residents, while Halton’s approach runs counter to provincial guidance and may severely restrict housing choice in the region in the future.

True Crime Byline: How one childhood incident pushed Dawn Crey into a downward spiral from which she would never escape   The new podcast True Crime Byline looks back at The Vancouver Sun investigation into Vancouver's missing women, a case that eventually led to the arrest and conviction of Robert Pickton. This profile of missing woman Dawn Crey was part of a series of investigative stories published in 2001.

What are the signs of cataracts?   While there is currently no known way to prevent cataracts, you can reduce your risk by wearing sunglasses, eating foods rich in antioxidants, and getting regular eye exams.
